title: Survive

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: shadows circle in the dark (whispers echo
through the streets) hunting footsteps
after dark (no escape, no release)
[Pre-Chorus] not for what i've done they seek my blood tonight nowhere left to run as stars fade from sight

sections.label: Chorus
lines: rise up and find me in this grace your
light bleeds through the night.
Let them come to take this place you are
my fortress you are my might (you're
all i need to survive)

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: in this empty room i wait for morning
light darkness closing soon but you're by my side

sections.label: Chorus
lines: rise up and find me in this grace your
light bleeds through the night.
Let them come to take this place you are
my fortress you are my might (you're
all i need to survive)

sections.label: Bridge
lines: (whispered/spoken) i'll sing your power when dawn breaks through shadows of the night let truth reveal what darkness takes in your love i'll survive

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: rise up and find me in this grace your light bleeds
through the night let them come to take
this place you are my fortress you are
my might (you're all i need...) (you're
all i need...) (to survive...)

epigraph: defend me from them that rise up against me
